India's Student
Campus Marketplace

Buy and sell books, notes, gadgets, and furniture. Find internships, offer services, and earn — all within your college campus.

India's student hustle network — where notes, skills, and money move.

THE MANIFESTO

"Every problem you have on campus can be solved by another student sitting 50 meters away."

Jugarr is built on a simple, powerful truth: a university is not just a campus—it is a self-sustaining circular economy of untapped student genius.

01 / RADICAL TRUST

Verified Peers Only

Only verified student profiles can enter the network. No outside spammers, no corporate middlemen. Just a safe, high-trust circle of classmates.

02 / UNTAPPED CAPITAL

The Broke Genius Economy

Turn your exam prep notes, design skills, coding help, or second-hand hostel gear into real capital. Solve immediate problems for others while funding your own student life.

03 / ZERO COMMISSIONS

Radically Direct

No middleman commissions. No corporate apps charging you platform fees. Direct student-to-student exchange, meeting in your library or hostel lobby.

notes bhej de
bike chahiye
PPT bana de
editor hai?
roommate needed

Students were already helping each other.

The system just never existed.

Everything students need already exists nearby.

Jugarr is the student marketplace that connects campus needs with campus talent — no middlemen, no outside apps. Just student-to-student exchange.

Books

Sell old textbooks or find affordable second-hand books from seniors on your campus.

Notes

Share or buy handwritten and digital study notes for every subject and semester.

Furniture

Buy and sell second-hand hostel furniture — desks, chairs, mattresses, kettles and more.

Cycles

Find affordable used bicycles or sell your campus cycle before you graduate.

Gadgets

Trade second-hand laptops, phones, chargers, and accessories with verified students.

Skills

Offer your design, coding, writing, or tutoring skills and earn from peers who need them.

THE STUDENT MARKETPLACE

What Can You Do on Jugarr?

01 / BUY

Buy What You Need

Find affordable second-hand books, furniture, gadgets, and cycles listed by students on your campus. Save money on everything from textbooks to hostel essentials.

BROWSE ITEMS →
02 / SELL

Sell What You Don’t

Turn unused items into cash. List your old books, notes, furniture, or gadgets and reach buyers in your own college.

START SELLING →
03 / EARN

Earn From Your Skills

Offer services like graphic design, coding, tutoring, or content writing. Get paid by fellow students who need your talent.

OFFER SERVICES →
04 / LEARN

Learn From Peers

Access shared study notes, exam prep material, and project references created by students in your own university.

ACCESS NOTES →
05 / COLLABORATE

Collaborate on Projects

Find teammates for hackathons, startups, college fests, and academic projects. Connect with students who complement your skills.

FIND PARTNERS →

How It Works

01

Post what you need.

Whether it's semester project help or a second-hand cycle, just put it out there.

02

Students nearby respond.

The app notifies relevant students on your campus who can fulfill the request.

03

Collaborate. Earn. Solve.

Meet up, get the work done or exchange the item, and build your campus reputation.

TRUST & SAFETY

Why Students Trust Jugarr

[ SECURE ]

Safe Student Ecosystem

Only verified college students can join. No outside sellers, no spam, no scams.

[ COMMUNITY ]

Community Driven

Built by students, moderated by students. Every transaction happens within your trusted campus circle.

[ 0% FEES ]

Zero Platform Fees

No commissions, no hidden charges. Every rupee stays between you and the other student.

[ CAMPUS ]

Campus-First Approach

Jugarr is designed for Indian colleges. Meet in your library, canteen, or hostel lobby — safe and convenient.

REAL CAMPUS LEGENDS

Campus Hustle Stories

01 / ACADEMIC HUSTLE

The Exam Savior

Who needs standard lectures when Room 304 has the ultimate Exam Cheat-Sheets? Handwritten, comprehensive exam prep packages passed under doors for tea, snacks, or split cash.

02 / LATE NIGHT HUSTLE

The 3 AM Maggi Express

Hostel gates close at 11, college hunger peaks at 2 AM. A student-run bicycle delivery network bringing hot Maggi and hot chai straight to hostel lobbies in minutes.

03 / TECH HUSTLE

The Broke Genius Studio

Designing seed round startup decks for seniors, coding custom websites for college festivals, or building campus projects — funded entirely by local peer-to-peer exchanges.

Faces Behind Jugarr

Jugarr started in a hostel room at 2 AM after seeing 50+ unread messages in a 'Campus Help' WhatsApp group. We realized students have incredible talent but no platform to trade it.

Made by students, for students.

Sagar Singh Rajawat

Founder

Prince Mishra

Co-Founder

Meet Juggu: The 'J' of Jugarr

Juggu is not just a character—he is the literal "J" of Jugarr. He is the ultimate street-smart broke genius representing the hustle, resourcefulness, and mutual support of Indian campus life. Whenever notes move, gear changes hands, or cash is earned, Juggu is there pulling the strings.

Jugarr’s Official Hustle Mascot

Frequently Asked Questions

Jugarr is India’s student-to-student campus marketplace where college students can buy, sell, trade, and earn within their own university community. Think of it as a trusted, campus-only marketplace built exclusively for students.

Students sign up with their college email, browse or list items and services, and connect directly with other verified students on campus. No middlemen, no shipping — just meet up on campus and exchange.

Simply create a listing for your old textbooks with photos and a price. Students in your college searching for those books will find your listing and reach out directly.

Yes. Graduating students frequently list desks, chairs, mattresses, and shelves at affordable prices. Buyers can inspect items on campus before purchasing.

Yes, Jugarr is completely free. There are no listing fees, no commissions, and no hidden charges. Every transaction is direct and between students.

Jugarr is currently launching across select Indian colleges. Join the waitlist with your college email, and we will notify you when your campus goes live.

Enter your name and college email on the waitlist form. Once enough students from your campus sign up, we activate Jugarr for your college. Early members get priority access and founding member benefits.

What is Jugarr? India's Campus Marketplace for Students

Jugarr is India's first student-to-student campus marketplace — a platform where college students can buy, sell, trade, and earn within their own university ecosystem. Whether you need to sell old textbooks after exams, find affordable second-hand furniture for your hostel room, or buy a used bicycle for your daily campus commute, Jugarr makes it effortless.

The idea behind Jugarr is simple: every Indian college campus is already a thriving micro-economy. Students sell handwritten notes, trade gadgets, offer tutoring, design projects, and run small services — but they do it through scattered WhatsApp groups, notice boards, and word of mouth. Jugarr brings all of this into one trusted, organized student marketplace.

On Jugarr, you can list second-hand books, study notes, electronics, furniture, and cycles for sale. You can also offer skills-based services like graphic design, video editing, coding, content writing, and academic tutoring — and get paid directly by peers on your campus. Students looking for internships, freelance gigs, or project collaborators can discover opportunities posted by fellow students and campus organizations.

What makes Jugarr different from generic classifieds or e-commerce apps is its campus-first approach. Every user is a verified college student. Every transaction happens within your college community — face to face, in your hostel lobby, library, or canteen. There are no platform commissions, no shipping hassles, and no strangers. Just students helping students.

Jugarr is currently rolling out across colleges in India. Join the waitlist today to bring the student marketplace to your campus and become a founding member of your college's Jugarr community.

Join India's Student Campus Marketplace — Free

60+ students from colleges across India have already joined. Be among the first to buy, sell, and earn on your campus.

Connecting the dots of campus potential across India.
